subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Ultimate Goal of my desire and hope! These are Thy servants who have acknowledged Thy oneness and have believed in Thy perfect Words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب یا غایه مقصدی و رجائی هولاء عباد اقروا بوحدانیتک و صدقوا بکلماتک التامات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
